name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: Part of the cave maze. Map your route carefully.
NORTH returns to the main maze junction. EAST leads to the hill foot. WEST goes deeper in the maze.
Go EAST to exit the caves at the hill foot (room 14), or NORTH to return to the junction.
notes: Cave maze room connecting to the main junction (N/room 7), hill foot (E/room 14), and deeper caves (W/room 13).
